meaning: n.波斯人[语]adj.波斯的,波斯人[语]
examples: The Persian Gulf has 65 percent of the world's oil reserves.
The Babylonian Empire was conquered by the Persian Empire in 539 BCE.
They approved a $1.1 billion package of pay increases for the veterans of the Persian Gulf War.
In 1987, Gangel covered the Iran-Iraq war as part of the Pentagon pool in the Persian Gulf.
Persian ( 16 March), Cambodian ( 21 April) and Hindu New Year (2 November) workshops are also scheduled.
